per_criterion.rationale: Axis B: openings anchor on named entities/specific numbers (HubSpot at $2M ARR, sub-100ms, 5 capabilities, 2-year shift) — not topic-statement or throat-clearing; Axis A: each opening creates a bounded forward vector (which 5 things? what was the cost? how did math change?); Axis C: bodies deliver the promised gap — draft 002 enumerates the 5 capabilities, draft 003 closes the HubSpot narrative with $150k/year resolution, draft 004 lands the concrete iteration delta.
